title: Fix: Off-by-one error in array indexing
original_text: Fixed off-by-one error in array indexing. Array bounds were being incorrectly calculated. Added proper index validation. Implemented zero-based indexing consistency. Added unit tests for boundary conditions. Result: off-by-one error fixed.
expected_subject: fix(core): fix off-by-one error in array indexing
expected_body_lines: - Add unit tests for boundary conditions
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(core): fix off-by-one error in array indexing"
